text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, October 05. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that modified the smart-home alert integrations. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the schedule covered. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Prepping school lunches for the week. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Let's organize the menu. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's get that resolved. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading scientific papers late tonight. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the grocery list ready. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Good weekend progress on home projects. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
